data.title: Cronos Launches $42,000 Global Hackathon to Build AI-Native On-Chain Payment Systems
data.description:
Cronos has kicked off the x402 PayTech Hackathon, a global developer competition offering a $42,000 prize pool to accelerate the creation of AI-native, on-chain payment applications. Built in partnership with DoraHacks, the initiative targets the next generation of automated financial infrastructure by combining artificial intelligence with blockchain-based settlement systems.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/cronos-launches-42000-global-hackathon-to-build-ai-native-on-chain-payment-systems/

data.title: China Reaffirms Ban on Virtual Assets and Stablecoins in New PBOC Statement
data.description:

source: https://btcusa.com/china-reaffirms-ban-on-virtual-assets-and-stablecoins-in-new-pboc-statement/

data.title: Bitcoin Leverage Flush Wipes Out $8B in Open Interest as Whales Accumulate

data.title: FalconX Transfers Over $50 Million in Ethereum to Anonymous Address
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Arkham data reveals that at 00:52, FalconX transferred 16,692.79 ETH, valued at approximately $50.1 million, to an anonymous address beginning with 0x2e6c.

data.title:

A new wallet 0x2e6c — likely linked to #Bitmine — just received 16,693 $ETH($50.1M) from the #FalconX.

data.title: Crypto fundraising on pace for 150% year-on-year growth in 2025
data.description:
Cryptocurrency companies have attracted around $25 billion in venture capital this year, more than double the previous year’s total and surpassing industry forecasts in a reversal of fortunes for the beleaguered sector. Centralized exchanges, prediction markets, and decentralized finance platforms saw the biggest investments in the sector. Most of these investments were led by major […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crypto-fundraising-on-pace-for-growth-2025/

data.title: South Africa Shelves Retail CBDC Plan, Prioritizes Modernizing Existing Payment Systems
data.description:
South Africa’s central bank has stepped back from launching a retail central bank digital currency (CBDC), concluding that the country does not currently need one.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/south-africa-shelves-retail-cbdc-plan-prioritizes-modernizing-existing-payment-systems/

data.title: Coinbase Submits Crypto Regulation Proposal On Derivatives, Stablecoin
data.description:
Key Insights In latest crypto news, Coinbase issued a set of recommendations to the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC). This followed a request for feedback on the President’s Working Group report. The exchange noted it was ready to throw its expertise and participate in the creation of relevant crypto regulations
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/11/29/coinbase-crypto-regulation-proposals-on-derivatives-stablecoin/

data.title: AI experts jump ship from Musk’s Tesla to new robotics startup
data.description:
Tesla has lost at least ten of its long-term, experienced engineers to a new robotics startup called Sunday Robotics. Sunday Robotics recently unveiled its product called Memo, along with a team consisting of engineers who previously worked on various Tesla AI products. Tesla loses employees to a new robotics startup A new robotics startup called […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ai-experts-from-tesla-to-robotics-startup/

data.title: Significant Transfer of SUN Tokens to Justin Sun Observed
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham reveals that at 23:34, a total of 399,969,426.94 SUN tokens, valued at approximately $8.39 million, were transferred from SUN.io to Justin Sun.

data.title: South Korea Expands Crypto Travel Rule to All Transactions in Major AML Crackdown
data.description:
South Korea is tightening its grip on illicit crypto activity with a sweeping expansion of the Travel Rule, announced by the Financial Services Commission (FSC) on November 28, 2025.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/south-korea-expands-crypto-travel-rule-to-all-transactions-in-major-aml-crackdown/
